member.name: T:JG.AuditKit.Abstractions.IAuditFilter
member.summary: Determines whether an audit entry should be recorded.

member.name: M:JG.AuditKit.Abstractions.IAuditFilter.ShouldWrite(JG.AuditKit.AuditEntry)
member.summary: Evaluates whether the specified entry should be written.
member.returns: when the entry should be written; otherwise, .

member.name: T:JG.AuditKit.Abstractions.IAuditLog
member.summary: Writes immutable audit entries to the configured audit pipeline.
member.remarks: Implementations are thread-safe and designed for concurrent use across multiple request threads.

member.name: M:JG.AuditKit.Abstractions.IAuditLog.WriteAsync(JG.AuditKit.AuditEntry,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enqueues an audit entry for asynchronous processing.
member.param: A cancellation token that can stop enqueueing.
member.returns: A task that completes when the entry is accepted or skipped by filters.

member.name: T:JG.AuditKit.Abstractions.IAuditSink
member.summary: Writes accepted audit entries to a storage destination.
member.remarks: Implementations must be thread-safe and must not throw for recoverable write failures.

member.name: M:JG.AuditKit.Abstractions.IAuditSink.WriteAsync(JG.AuditKit.AuditEntry,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Writes a single audit entry to the sink.
member.returns: A task that represents the write operation.

member.name: T:JG.AuditKit.AuditChainVerificationResult
member.summary: Represents the result of an audit hash chain verification run.

member.name: M:JG.AuditKit.AuditChainVerificationResult.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct.
member.param: Indicates whether the chain is valid.
The first invalid entry index, or -1 when valid.
The expected hash value at the invalid entry.
The actual hash value at the invalid entry.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditChainVerificationResult.IsValid
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the chain is valid.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditChainVerificationResult.InvalidIndex
member.summary: Gets the first invalid entry index, or -1 when valid.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditChainVerificationResult.ExpectedHash
member.summary: Gets the expected hash at the invalid index.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditChainVerificationResult.ActualHash
member.summary: Gets the actual hash at the invalid index.

member.name: T:JG.AuditKit.AuditEntry
member.summary: Represents one immutable audit event.

member.name: M:JG.AuditKit.AuditEntry.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.DateTimeOffset,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The actor who performed the action.
member.exception: Thrown when required string values are empty.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditEntry.Actor
member.summary: Gets the actor who performed the action.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditEntry.Action
member.summary: Gets the action that occurred.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditEntry.Resource
member.summary: Gets the target resource.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditEntry.Timestamp
member.summary: Gets the event timestamp.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditEntry.CorrelationId
member.summary: Gets the correlation identifier for request or workflow tracing.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditEntry.Metadata
member.summary: Gets additional context metadata.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditEntry.PreviousHash
member.summary: Gets the hash of the previous entry in the chain.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditEntry.Hash
member.summary: Gets the hash for this entry.

member.name: T:JG.AuditKit.AuditHashChainVerifier
member.summary: Verifies SHA-256 hash chain integrity for a sequence of audit entries.

member.name: M:JG.AuditKit.AuditHashChainVerifier.Verify(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{JG.AuditKit.AuditEntry},System.String,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Verifies chain integrity from the specified seed hash.
member.param: The entries to verify in order.
An optional logger for chain break diagnostics.

member.name: T:JG.AuditKit.AuditKitOptions
member.summary: Configures JG.AuditKit behavior.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditKitOptions.DefaultSinkTypes
member.summary: Gets the default sink service types that are registered by AddAuditKit.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditKitOptions.DefaultFilterTypes
member.summary: Gets the default filter service types that are registered by AddAuditKit.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditKitOptions.HashSeed
member.summary: Gets or sets the hash seed for the first chain entry.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditKitOptions.EnableHashChaining
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether hash chaining is enabled.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditKitOptions.TimeProvider
member.summary: Gets or sets the clock used to resolve timestamps.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditKitOptions.ChannelCapacity
member.summary: Gets or sets the channel capacity used by the internal audit queue.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.AuditKitOptions.FileSink
member.summary: Gets file sink configuration used by .

member.name: M:JG.AuditKit.AuditKitOptions.AddDefaultSink``1
member.summary: Adds a default sink type that is auto-registered.

member.name: M:JG.AuditKit.AuditKitOptions.AddDefaultFilter``1
member.summary: Adds a default filter type that is auto-registered.

member.name: T:JG.AuditKit.Sinks.ConsoleSink
member.summary: Writes audit entries to standard output as JSON lines.

member.name: T:JG.AuditKit.Sinks.FileSink
member.summary: Appends audit entries to a JSON lines file.
member.remarks: Writes are serialized with an async lock to preserve line-level append ordering.

member.name: M:JG.AuditKit.Sinks.FileSink.#ctor(JG.AuditKit.Sinks.FileSinkOptions)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.exception: Thrown when configured path is empty.

member.name: M:JG.AuditKit.Sinks.FileSink.Dispose
member.summary: Releases sink resources.

member.name: T:JG.AuditKit.Sinks.FileSinkOptions
member.summary: Configures file sink behavior.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.Sinks.FileSinkOptions.Path
member.summary: Gets or sets the base path for audit output.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.Sinks.FileSinkOptions.RollDaily
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to roll files daily.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.Sinks.FileSinkOptions.MaxFileSizeBytes
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum file size in bytes before rotation. Set to null to disable size-based rotation.

member.name: T:JG.AuditKit.Sinks.InMemorySink
member.summary: Stores audit entries in memory for testing and diagnostics.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.Sinks.InMemorySink.Entries
member.summary: Gets a snapshot of entries written to the sink.

member.name: P:JG.AuditKit.Sinks.InMemorySink.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of entries currently stored.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.AuditKitServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides service registration APIs for JG.AuditKit.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.AuditKitServiceCollectionExtensions.AddAuditKit(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{JG.AuditKit.AuditKitOptions})
member.summary: Registers core audit services and default sinks and filters.
member.exception: Thrown when configured default sink or filter types are invalid.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.AuditKitServiceCollectionExtensions.AddAuditSink``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers a custom audit sink.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.AuditKitServiceCollectionExtensions.AddAuditFilter``1(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Registers a custom audit filter.
